3173400.name: Speedrun Maker
3173400.description:
Speedrun Maker is a speedrunning game with guns.

Movement:
Players can surf, bunny hop, slide, and control themselves in the air.
Grapple Gun: physics based grapple that does not pull the player. Use it to swing off objects.
Rocket launcher: Launch yourself to the finish.

Level Editor:
Create and upload your own levels easily with the built in level editor. Creating levels has been made easy with no 3rd party programs.

Leaderboard and Replays:
Upload your fastest times with replays, or watch the fastest times of other players.

Official levels:
Play the included levels and fight for the most competitive records.
